events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

events.name: resource_strike
events.description: Subsurface water table detected by ground-penetrating radar.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Luna Tide asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Ripple Tide asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'

memories.event: Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.
Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.
Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.
Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.
Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.
Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
